title: SPX - 04/05
html:
TRADE ID: 202604051140
SPX - 04/05
Test Trade Entry - DUMMY WRITE UP

Testing the process of automation

SPX showed support and this trade banks on it.

Trade Alert: SPX (Bullish / Neutral) Note: Skip these setups if you are already long SPX.

+ Setup 2 (Active): Sell the 4/17 6200/6195 credit put spread for a .5. This catches the falling knife while leaving lines of support to play out. Note: Testin notes for trades

Nic
